title: Warhammer Quest - Take a Look - Part 6 - The Warrior Expansions part A
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P7i-qgVG7c4

Daniel (@dungeondive) shifts focus from dungeons to heroes with the first instalment covering Warhammer Quest's warrior expansion packs. These blister-pack character expansions each added a new playable warrior with unique abilities, equipment, and progression paths.

Part A covers the first batch of warriors, examining what each brings to the party and how they change the dungeon crawling dynamic. Not every warrior is created equal, and Daniel isn't shy about which ones earn their place in the adventuring party.

----

In games with many character options, do you gravitate toward the optimal picks or the ones with the most personality?
